chunks.text: Ali Ghodsi is one of the 10 coolest data science and machine learning CEOs - EECS at Berkeley CS Adjunct Prof. Ali Ghodsi is on Solutions Review’s list of “The 10 Coolest Data Science and Machine Learning CEOs.” Ghodsi is the CEO and co-founder of Databricks, and responsible for the growth and international expansion of the company. He previously served as the VP of Engineering and Product Management before taking the role of CEO in January 2016. Ghodsi is on the board of the RiseLab and was one of the creators of the open source project Apache Spark. Categories Faculty Honors Industry Research View Open Faculty Positions
